center.name: 瓦努科省
center.summary: 瓦努科省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-hooded tanager，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-hooded tanager is found in the Western, Central, and Eastern Andes of Colombia and on the eastern slope of the Andes south through Ecuador to Peru's Huánuco Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-hooded tanager is found in the Western, Central, and Eastern Andes of Colombia and on the eastern slope of the Andes south through Ecuador to Peru's Huánuco Province
